parameters.query:
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET status = 'processing', current_step = 'loading_data', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};
SELECT
  vs.script_text,
  vp.prompt_text,
  vp.scene_descriptions,
  ci.title,
  ci.concept,
  ci.visual_description,
  ps.product_image_url AS db_product_image_url,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'a2e_api_token' LIMIT 1) AS a2e_token,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'a2e_avatar_id' LIMIT 1) AS a2e_avatar_id,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'a2e_voice_id' LIMIT 1) AS a2e_voice_id,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'ai_api_key' LIMIT 1) AS gptunnel_key,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'tts_gptunnel_voice_id' LIMIT 1) AS tts_voice_id,
  (SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'site_url' LIMIT 1) AS site_url
FROM pipeline_sessions ps
LEFT JOIN voice_scripts vs ON vs.id = ps.voice_script_id
LEFT JOIN video_prompts vp ON vp.id = ps.video_prompt_id
LEFT JOIN content_ideas ci ON ci.id = ps.idea_id
WHERE ps.id = {{ $json.session_id }};
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET current_step = 'a2e_image_to_video', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

return [$('🔗 Объединение данных').first()];

parameters.query: UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET current_step = 'a2e_product_poll', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};

parameters.jsCode:
// Postgres UPDATE очищает $json — берём данные из ноды извлечения
return [$('🔑 Извлечь video_id').first()];

parameters.query:
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET
  status = 'ready_for_review',
  current_step = 'review',
  raw_video_url = '{{ $json.raw_video_url }}',
  final_video_url = '{{ $json.raw_video_url }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id }};
UPDATE pipeline_sessions SET status = 'error', error_message = '{{ $json.error ? $json.error.message : "Unknown" }}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.session_id || 0 }};
